source_pr.title: executor: Add unit test case for ShowExecutor.
source_pr.body:
Add a mocked session manager for unit test.
PR #4739 could also get benefit from this PR.

symptoms: mux sync.Mutex // fix data race in ddl test.
failure_signature: mux sync.Mutex // fix data race in ddl test.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR adds new unit tests for `ShowExecutor` (with a mocked session manager) and extends the mock context to support a session manager. The patch does not clearly show a targeted stabilization fix for an intermittent/flaky failure; the evidence string is not a concrete flaky failure signature. We conservatively classify it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: mux sync.Mutex // fix data race in ddl test.
